footer_description: Discover more activities in our welcome email!
footer_brand_desc: A pair of family-run Spanish rentals on the Mar Menor — booked direct, hosted by Loan.
errors_end_after_start: The end date must be after the start date.
errors_positive_price_required: The price must be a positive number.
reservation_form_placeholder_description: Hello, I would like to make a reservation...
reservation_toaster_success: Your reservation from {startDate} to {endDate} has been sent to the host.
reservation_toaster_error: An error occurred while processing your reservation!
home_hero_paragraph: Two family-run Spanish rentals on the edge of the Mediterranean's only inland sea — a beachfront casa in the village, a quiet penthouse over the golf course.
home_intro_paragraph: Whether you want salt-air mornings five minutes from the beach, or quiet sunset terraces over the fairway, we built one of these for each of you. Pick the one that fits the week you have in mind.
home_story_p1: We built this small collection one stay at a time. Casa DaNa came first — the family casa, the rooftop, the slow Saturdays. Casa CasAy followed when guests started asking for somewhere quieter, with a pool, a little inland.
home_story_p2: We host both ourselves: direct bookings, no agencies, no fees added at checkout. If you write us, you're writing the person who picked the linens.
home_cta_strip_tail: on the Mar Menor — your pick of casa.
prop_casadana_short_description: A six-person Spanish casa with a private rooftop solarium and jacuzzi, just 1.6 km from the Mar Menor. Built for slow mornings, long lunches, and the kind of trip you tell people about for years.
prop_casacasay_short_description: An elegant 104 m² penthouse in a secure community, fifteen minutes inland. A wide terrace with uninterrupted views of the golf course — the kind of place you remember at the end of a quiet, sunlit week.
casadana_description: Discover our charming Spanish rental house in Los Alcázares, perfect for accommodating up to six people. Just 1.6 km from the beach, you'll find plenty of activities nearby to enhance your stay.
casadana_checklist_sixth: A town not overcrowded with tourists
casadana_gallery_description: Every room is designed with an editorial eye, blending local textures with modern luxury.
casadana_about_title: Refined Living on the Mar Menor
casadana_experiences_description: From high-speed thrills to serene maritime journeys, the Mar Menor offers activities for every soul.
casadana_local_area_description: Los Alcázares is more than a destination; it's a sensory experience. From the therapeutic waters of the Mar Menor to the hidden thermal springs of Archena, discover a region where history and wellness converge.
casadana_los_alcazares_description: Los Alcázares, a charming village nestled in the heart of Spain, enchants with its authenticity and warm atmosphere. Surrounded by picturesque landscapes, this haven of peace offers a perfect blend of tradition and modernity. With its quaint streets, local markets, and proximity to the beach (Mar Menor), Los Alcázares is an ideal destination for lovers of culture, nature, and relaxation.
casacasay_description:
Welcome to Casa CasAy, an elegant 104 m² penthouse designed for your comfort and relaxation. Nestled in a secure gated community, it offers a superb terrace with breathtaking views of the golf course, ideal for savoring every moment in complete serenity.
Perfect for accommodating up to 4 people, this haven of tranquility is located just 15 minutes from the Mar Menor and Los Alcázares, where you will also find Casa DaNa.
Let yourself be seduced by a place where comfort, calm and sunshine come together to create unforgettable memories.
gallery_description: Discover our gallery of carefully selected photos, highlighting the unique charms of our properties.
